# scenario: VE query on a V10-family flow controller
# Captured 2026-04-17 from a real MC-500SCCM-D unit at /dev/ttyUSB0
# (Prolific PL2303, 19200 baud, unit_id=A). Note the date format —
# `<Mon> <DD> <YYYY>,<HH:MM:SS>` matches what the V8/V9 8v17 emits;
# this dispels the design's earlier assumption that V10 uses ISO and
# only V8/V9 uses month-name. Both families use the same VE shape.

> AVE
< A   10v20.0-R24 Jan  9 2025,15:04:07
